crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update your heartbeat, check inbox, and work on your highest priority task. MANDATORY LAST STEP: cortextos bus update-cron-fire heartbeat --interval 4h

crons.name: integration-health-check-morning
crons.prompt: Read skills/integration-health-check/SKILL.md and execute the integration health check. Review all external dependency health, produce the health note, and report risks. MANDATORY LAST STEP: cortextos bus update-cron-fire integration-health-check-morning --interval 12h && cortextos bus update-heartbeat alive

crons.name: integration-health-check-evening
crons.prompt: Read skills/integration-health-check/SKILL.md and execute the integration health check. Review all external dependency health, produce the health note, and report risks. MANDATORY LAST STEP: cortextos bus update-cron-fire integration-health-check-evening --interval 12h && cortextos bus update-heartbeat alive

crons.name: routing-callback-review
crons.prompt: Read skills/routing-callback-review/SKILL.md and execute the routing and callback integrity review. This is highest priority — ensure the care loop is viable. MANDATORY LAST STEP: cortextos bus update-cron-fire routing-callback-review --interval 24h && cortextos bus update-heartbeat alive

crons.name: integration-boundary-review
crons.prompt: Read skills/integration-boundary-review/SKILL.md and execute the integration boundary review. Validate normalization boundaries and check for provider-specific logic leaking into platform. MANDATORY LAST STEP: cortextos bus update-cron-fire integration-boundary-review --interval 48h && cortextos bus update-heartbeat alive

crons.name: weekly-risk-report
crons.prompt: Read skills/weekly-risk-report/SKILL.md and produce the weekly integration risk summary. Include dependency map, top risks, V1 readiness, and recommended priorities. MANDATORY LAST STEP: cortextos bus update-cron-fire weekly-risk-report --interval 168h && cortextos bus update-heartbeat alive

crons.name: provider-change-review
crons.prompt: Read skills/provider-change-review/SKILL.md and execute the weekly provider documentation and change review. Detect external changes that could break integrations. MANDATORY LAST STEP: cortextos bus update-cron-fire provider-change-review --interval 168h && cortextos bus update-heartbeat alive

crons.name: experiment-normalization-drift
crons.prompt: Read .claude/skills/autoresearch/SKILL.md and execute the experiment loop for normalization-drift cycle. MANDATORY LAST STEP: cortextos bus update-cron-fire experiment-normalization-drift --interval 72h && cortextos bus update-heartbeat alive

crons.name: stale-offer-cleanup
crons.prompt: Check stale offer status: run 'cd /Users/arndt/phytomedic-saas && npx convex run functions/cannametrics:cannametricsMorningKpis {}' and review providerSyncHealth freshness. If any provider shows hoursSince>25, flag it. Note: stale offer deactivation (markStaleOffersUnavailable) runs automatically via Convex internal cron at 06:45 UTC — do not attempt to call it via npx convex run (it is an internalMutation). Report current offer freshness by provider. MANDATORY LAST STEP: cortextos bus update-cron-fire stale-offer-cleanup --interval 24h && cortextos bus update-heartbeat alive
